mapper.insert: INSERT INTO score (student_id, course_id, class_performance, experiment, homework, final_project, score_type, total) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{classPerformance}, #{experiment}, #{homework}, #{finalProject}, #{scoreType}, #{total})
mapper.update: UPDATE score SET class_performance = #{classPerformance}, experiment = #{experiment}, homework = #{homework}, final_project = #{finalProject}, score_type = #{scoreType}, total = #{total} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM score WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT s.*, c.course_name, c.term FROM score s LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT s.*, st.name AS student_name, st.student_no FROM score s LEFT JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY s.total DESC
